flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of North Dakota fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of North Dakota are 23% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.6k vs $51.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of North Dakota rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (9.0k → 10.0k).
